reviews.title: Excellent Keyboard!
reviews.text: This was a Christmas gift for my daughter and she absolutely loves everything about this keyboard. Thank you

reviews.title: Keyboard is very loud when typing!
reviews.text: The mouse is pretty standard, nothing great, but nothing bad. I brought my cute little set to work in my laptop bag so I figured it was secure. When I took the keyboard out 1 letter had popped off. No biggie, it snapped back on easily. The keyboard buttons are bit higher than I'm used to so I was typing slower and it was a bit uncomfortable after a while. I planned on switching back to my regular keyboard shortly but what escalated that switch was how loud the keyboard was while I was typing. My office is usually rather quiet plus I'm in a cubicle and a coworker asked what are you doing over there!?! He said it sounded like I was hammering the letters with a small hammer. I knew it was loud but after realizing it was bothering my coworkers I immediately put it in my bag to bring home. Haven't used it since!

reviews.title: Nice keyboard and mouse set
reviews.text: This is a great mouse and keyboard set, feels like typing on an old typewriter but more comfortable. I like the combined usb. Looks very nice, comfortable to use,

reviews.title: Amusing
reviews.text: I really like this set. They both match perfectly. The keyboard is comfortable and all the buttons work perfectly. I like the round buttons they are pretty cool. Connects easy enough. Just wish it was rechargeable.

reviews.title: Plug and Play Wireless Keyboard; Not sure about the mouse
reviews.text: I run Windows 10 on my laptop, and this wireless keyboard was up and running in few minutes after unpackaging.  You will need to provide your own batteries (2 AA – one for the mouse and one for the keyboard).  The keys are not tactile like other “typewriter” keyboard I have, but the keys have enough tension in the loaded spring to give a slight “satisfactory” feel to the keystrokes.  The wireless connection between the receiver and the keyboard/mouse was responsive and experienced no noticeable delay.  I am not 100% sold on the “milk tea” colored keyboard, but it slowly grew on me after a few days of use, although my 8-year young daughter thought it was like a puke color… an interesting observation.  The mouse was not for me.  It was too flat and too small for my hand, and after a few hours of cumbersome use, I switched back to my existing mouse pad.  For less than $49 USD, I think this keyboard brings a fun look to the otherwise a boring office environment.

title: Rechargeable Wireless Mouse, Illuminating Backlit Powered by Li-Polymer Battery, Optical Sensor, Nano USB Receiver,3 Stages DPI Speed, 4 Buttons for PC, Laptop, Tablet, MacBook etc. (Solo Firework)

reviews.title: Too small to be ergonomic for large hands
reviews.text: This will be a quick return. This mouse is too small and does not have enough vertical lift to be ergonomic for someone with large hands. I was pleased with how quickly it charged. But after fully charging there is no response at all from the DPI button. And the initial setting is too slow for the mouse to be of real use. If I had kids at home I would pass this along for schoolwork, but it isn't adequate for gaming or long stretches of editing.

reviews.title: Perfect for carpal tunnel
reviews.text: If you have carpal tunnel get this now. No pain at all anymore

reviews.title: Nice vertical mouse

reviews.title: Battery life isn't that great
reviews.text: I use this for work. 5 days a week for about 7 hours a day. I turn it off every night and turn it on every morning. I love everything about this mouse but the battery isn't that great. It died after about 2 weeks full charge

reviews.title: ASMR fantastic!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5a9baeffb5013de01b566ac34f1da8a5]] Love the way this keyboard sounds as I type.  I also like that the round keys allow a little more room in between keys and that I don’t make as many errors while typing.  The color is great and the design is think and sleek.

reviews.title: my favorite keyboard
reviews.text: This keyboard is the best! It is comfortable to use, matches my desk setup perfectly, and best of all, the keys AND the mouse are basically totally silent! My 10-month-old is a VERY light sleeper! Everything wakes her up, but not these. A major win for me! Highly recommend. 100% I would buy this again! (batteries are not included. You need one aa battery for the keyboard and also the mouse)

reviews.title: Wired + Wireless?  Work for you? Good multimedia controls & phone slot
reviews.text:
Not a fan of wireless accessories (the batteries typically fail without warning, makers want you to be surprised), I made an exception for this pairing model because the keyboard is wired.

PRO
-Ubiquitous AA battery for mouse
-Economical
-Numeric pad
-Multimedia buttons: Volume knob, buttons for mute, pause, previous, next
-A place to put your phone (nice touch!)

CON
-Neither is backlit
-KB not programmable

NEUTRAL
-Non-'clack-y' key design, these are "quiet"
-Some humans will like pink, not widely available, maybe a good gift
-Con (for me) is the wireless mouse

reviews.title: Fun cordless mouse and keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great little retro cordless keyboard and mouse combo. I ordered it because it has just one dongle that both operate from. That gives me more USB ports available for other things. It works great as long as the keyboard and mouse are close to the laptop or the tower. It lags a bit when it’s in a keyboard drawer. I like the compact and portable nature this setup includes!

reviews.title: pink keyboard and wireless mouse
reviews.text: Love the pink color of this retro keyboard and mouse.  Great that the keyboard is spill proof I can have my coffee and not worry about wrecking my keyboard.  Easily plugged right into my all-in-one computer.  Took me a little while to get used to the punk keycaps, and now I love how quiet and comfortable they are to use.  The mouse fits well in my hand, and the wheel rolls back and forth smoothly. Top 5 stars for this one!

reviews.title: Super product. Great price.
reviews.text: Really responsive and not overly sensitive. Has been a great addition for tablet. Seamless connection didn’t loose once. Easy to navigate instructions for set up. Great battery life. Used for 7 hours consecutive without sign of needing charged.

reviews.title: Move along. Don't waste your time and money here.
reviews.text:
UPDATE: Two months! Two months this mouse lasted, and that was with very light use. Fully charged, I was just scrolling with it when I felt the wheel break. It just stopped making the little clicky sound/feeling. No trauma, no misuse, just very very very cheaply made. I surrender. It's time to cough up the money and buy the Apple brand mouse for my MacBook. My sanity is at least worth the $60.

ORIGINAL REVIEW:
After three previous tries, I finally got a Bluetooth mouse for my MacBook. I'm hoping this one is sturdier than the last I purchased that barely lasted six months. That remains to be seen, but given the product materials, I'm not hopeful. Making the connection after power-up or sleep mode is a little finicky. Also, a solid flat dark surface/mouse pad seems to be a prerequisite. Without it, the cursor is slow to respond or just does its own thing. I've never seen a mouse with the jitters before, but this one will cause the cursor to jiggle and twitch, even though the mouse itself it perfectly still, untouched. I've watched the cursor jitter clear off the screen. However, using a solid black mouse pad seems to have dealt with the problem. I would send it back and try a different product, but I've sent so many cheaply made and/or mislabeled mice back to Amazon in the past month, I've got return fatigue. We'll give this one a chance with the mousepad solution.

reviews.title: Won't hold a charge - must keep plugged in
reviews.text:
I've been through two of these. I returned/exchanged this first hoping it was just a defect. This mouse will only function appropriately for about 4-5 minutes tops if not directly plugged in to USB , otherwise it starts jumping/skipping/lagging etc. Plugged in it's perfect though - so if you get lucky and get one that holds a charge you'll probably be very happy with it. I just decided to keep this one and keep it plugged in. It's not ideal but it gets the job done.
I should probably mention that it is very easy to set up, basically plug and play - which was nice.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Great size and portability.  Saves a slot for other use.

reviews.title: Worth it!
reviews.text: This purchase is worth it. The mouse is slim and connects perfectly with the laptop. Careful you don't lose the mouse in your papers!

title: Logitech M305 Gold Tendrils Wireless Mouse
description: This wireless mouse features 1000 dpi optical technology for responsive cursor control and 2.4GHz wireless technology for a reliable connection.

reviews.title: Nice design
reviews.text: I use this with my netbook to control it across the room. It is smaller than most other mouse. It goes easily in my travel bag. Nice design. I got tired of plain black.

reviews.title: One of the best everyday mice I've used
reviews.text:
I have input devices for drawing on my tablet, and I have a gaming mouse, but the Logitech M305 is an excellent mouse for every day use, so it's the one I use the most.

The mouse itself has very basic features,
* scroll wheel (mild clicking feedback)with side-click options
* battery status light (green when fully charged, red when almost out)
* two buttons
* an off switch
* a nano USB transmitter than stores inside the mouse
* uses a single AA battery

It does come in jazzy designs, and I liked the yellow/gold one the best. The one thing I might have wanted to change on this mouse is the on/off switch. The best nano-USB mouse I've ever had would automatically turn off when you stored the transmitter inside. With this one, be sure to flip the switch to off as well before you put it in your bag, or it will be down there draining the battery as it moves around.

If you are annoying that you have to own one Bluetooth mouse and one 2.4G wireless mouse separately for your laptop and tablet, or laptop and laptop, or laptop and desktop, this mouse is your ideal choice. You could intelligently switch the mode between both devices just by a click

Energy-saving: Built-in battery, easy to charge by micro usb cable, no more need for extra battery, can be charged by computer, power bank, adapter. Can be used 15 hours continuously after fully charged.

reviews.title: Works well, light, easy.
reviews.text: This works really well, I do wish it had a little bit more weight to it.  I use the surface mouse generally and love it.  I bought this as a replacement bc I transitioned my surface mouse to my work computer. This works similarly well, it’s just so light it doesn’t feel as sturdy.  It won’t work with 2 devices at once, you have to keep switching, but does have multiple ways to connect.

reviews.title: Sharp, poor cursor control, poor scrolling
reviews.text: I had hoped, for this price, I might get something that worked...NOT!  The edges are sharp and very uncomfortable.  If you have tiny hands, this might work.  Scrolling is pretty much a bumpy ride, all or nothing, no matter how you set the scroll.  The cursor was very hard to control and very hard to get it in the right place.  Yes, I played with mouse settings and tried to tweak but no go.

reviews.title: Awesome Bluetooth function and great price!
reviews.text: After ordering two other “blue tooth” mice and having to return them both when they were dependent on a USB port, this one came through with flying colors and was cheaper than the first two I had to buy and return!!

title: Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000
description:
Product Description
World’s Most Advanced Tracking — Go More Places Than Optical or Laser. The Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000, with revolutionary BlueTrack Technology, works more places than ever before, including on granite countertops, carpets — even on a wood table or a rough, unfinished park bench.
From the Manufacturer
Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000
Comfortable shape
World's Most Advanced Tracking - Go More Places Than Optical or Laser
The Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000, with revolutionary BlueTrack Technology, works more places than ever before, including on granite countertops, carpets - even on a wood table or a rough, unfinished park bench.
BlueTrack Technology
Comfort for Either Hand
Work anywhere with the world's most advanced tracking.
Comfort and durability
Modern design and premium finish provides comfort for either hand. Symmetrical shape and unique rubber grips give you control and cushioning.
Snap in and Go
Simply snap in the transceiver for convenient on-the-go storage.
Reliable Wireless
Microsoft 2.4 ghz wireless delivers a reliable connection with up to a 30-foot range.
8-Month Battery Life
Use your mouse without power interruption for up to 8 months. The snap-in transceiver automatically turns the mouse on and off, and the led battery status indicator lets you know when replacement is needed.
What is BlueTrack?
BlueTrack Technology works on more surfaces than both optical and laser mice. It uses high-angle imaging optics to generate an accurate picture of the surface.
System Requirements
Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows XP (excluding Windows XP 64-bit)
Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows XP (excluding Windows XP 64-bit)
100 MB
100 MB
2 AA alkaline included
2 AA alkaline included

reviews.title: Hey it works great HIGHLY RECOMMEND
reviews.text:
It works does random motion immediately recognized by my dell laptop workstation
I’m not monitored by my boss so can’t give insight to that consideration. IT KEEPS MY SCREEN open so I don’t have to keep logging in
Wish the jiggle button had a light to tell it’s active HOWEVER perhaps this is a good thing (it immediately jiggles so I know it’s working) no light no one knows around me it’s on
I’d highly recommend this

reviews.title: Great Wireless Mouse and Jiggler
reviews.text: This mouse is the perfect size and weight, moves well and clicks quietly. I love the jigglier functionality; you just press the button built into the mouse and it keep the mouse cursor moving on the screen. It keeps my window open and Office teams active. I should have gotten a mouse like this long ago; it allows you additional freedom at work when you need to be away from your desk for a while. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Very good idea
reviews.text: Very good idea to have this jiggler built in, other similar products need to have an additional equipment, and put mouse on it for moving, not as convenient as this one. But sometimes this product is not stable, after a couple of hours working, I found the mouse stopped moving, I checked and found the battery light was off due to unknown reason, and after I reset the battery, the mouse moved again, and such kinds of issue happened several times. Therefore, I can only gave 4 stars review. But anyway I like this cute tool.

reviews.title: Keep screensavers from activating or keep from being logged off for no activity!
reviews.text:
A very handy, take it with you mouse that will keep pretty much anything from timing out due to lack of activity. When you need to step away for a few minutes and not have anything you are working on, just press the button on top to activate the jiggler and keep the mouse pointer gently moving.
I have only had this for a week or so and it has already proved it's worth. When my screen saver kicks off any process I have running slows way down. When I am rendering media this is a major pain, or I should say "used to be a major pain".
The dongle for USB connectivity stores in the mouse itself so you can carry the mouse and never have to worry about losing the dongle. It also has an on/off switch to save battery life.
A nice piece of gear, I suggest this for anyone that doesn't want to time out again.

reviews.title: Quiet and Functional
reviews.text:
I have been searching for a product like this for a long time! I work remotely most days and have to rely on connecting through a VPN connection. The connection automatically disconnects after a certain time frame, so this jiggler function is great! I can click the button to activate and leave the computer.
The setup on this mouse is so simple. I plugged in the USB and the mouse worked right away.
My favorite feature that was unexpected was how quiet the mouse is. I wasn’t use to not being able to hear a click. Such a nice product!

reviews.title: It depends on what you want to do with it

reviews.title: Good Basic Mouse

reviews.title: Mouse in the house.
reviews.text: Works properly as it should, couldn’t beat the price.

reviews.title: It works great! But not for long!
reviews.text:
Came a day early, put two AAA batteries in, put the USB in the laptop, and away we go.

It works great.

Update: It didn't work for long. It starts out with the mouse going to sleep all on it's own, and then it gets worst (you wouldn't think it possible, would you). I left the laptop and mouse on while I ran to the store, when I came back it was working VERY intermittent (very jerky) so I opened it thinking maybe my batteries weren't all that good.

What did I find? One of the batteries was so hot I couldn't touch it. I'm surprised it didn't catch on fire.

I should have known better than to buy some Chinese garbage. Into the trash it went.

Don't buy this, it's a waste of good money.

reviews.title: Really improve the feel
reviews.text:
Before this I have never really considered changing the mouse feet. The only reason I purchased these was because I need to remove the old ones to solder in a new switch.

With the new micro switches installed. https://amzn.to/3ElgafC ( incase you are curious which ones) and the new feet this made a whole new mouse.

The feet arrived perfect no bends or wrinkles. Super easy to install. Just make sure you clean the area really good with some alcohol.

They glide so much better than stock feet. The feel is simply amazing. Now whenever I purchase a new mouse I will be upgrading the feet. If you are on the fence about it I would say go for it.

For durability I have had these on for over a month and they have no signs of wear. They still perform excellent.

Thank you for taking the time to read this and I hope that it was helpful in your purchase decision

description: The Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse combines an ultra-accurate native 18, 000 DPI optical sensor with a durable contoured shape that’s ideal for larger hands and palm grips. Easily connect to your PC via hyper-fast, sub-1ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless Technology Bluetooth or USB wired connection, with up to 50 hours of battery life. Powerful Corsair iCUE software allows you to precisely tune sensitivity in 1 DPI steps, customize the ten programmable buttons with macros or remaps, and synchronize your mouse’s three-zone RGB lighting with all your iCUE-compatible Corsair devices. With the freedom of wireless and the customizable precision you need to take your gameplay higher, take victory in hand with the Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless.
features: Three Ways to Game: Connect with hyper-fast, sub-1 ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless technology, low-latency bluetooth, or USB wired
Comfort when it counts: Contoured shape that’s sculpted specifically for palm-grips and larger hands

Powerfully precise optical gaming sensor: A custom Pixart PMW3391 native 18,000 DPI sensor, adjustable in one DPI resolution steps, gives you total sensitivity customization and ultra-accurate tracking
Ten fully programmable buttons: Customise the way you play with powerful macros and key remaps to give you an in-game advantage

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part
reviews.text: I bought mine at Best Buy and not Amazon. It lasted about a year and a half. Still mostly works but the wheel button doesn't work anymore.  If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

reviews.title: ** Use tips ** Nice mouse....
reviews.text:
Nice mouse.... slightly large, and I have large hands. If you have small hands, I would purchase a size down.

It is simple to set up, works well (so far), and I like the wireless feature.

Tips:

My other mouse had a place to store the USB unit. This one also has a storage slot, which makes it convenient. Otherwise, you can leave the USB connector in the laptop (If it fits in your case with the device inserted...)

Be sure to turn off the device when not in use to conserve your batteries. (Sliding switch on bottom)

This mouse is Windows compatible. I run Windows 7.... works fine.

If you have a trackpad that drives you crazy, these devices are great!

Enjoy!

description: 7 Colorful LED breathing light change alternately, soothing light lights up the mouse in dark, adds more fun to the life. Note: It can't be set to one specific color. How to use it? * Charge the mouse for about 2 hours before using it for the first time. 1. Take the dongle out, which is stored at the bottom of the mouse. 2. Insert the dongle into the USB port of your device, and open the mouse switch (at the bottom of the mouse). 3. Allow a few seconds for installing, no action needed, just wait. Then you can use it. Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. Turn on the power switch and the mouse will work. Tips: The mouse cursor will move slowly or stop moving when the mouse is low battery. Please charge it on time. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.

1.Definitely recommend having a moues pad with this mouse 2.The mouse charges with a unique usb cable, so be sure not to lose it! 3.It’s rechargable,no battery is needed. It goes to sleep if not used for few minutes saving the charge!
Product Details:
Type: Wireless Mouse DPI:1600 Size:3.55 * 2.77 * 1.15 inch Operation distance: up to 10 meters
features: CUTE DESIGN: The right and left click buttons are the eyes and it has a scroll wheel for the nose,good gift idea!
PORTABLE and COMFORTABLE: Small in size(3.54" * 2.76" * 1.14"),Fit your hand nice and comfortable,Designed specifically for female users or kids who have small hands
RECHARGEABLE: Built-in rechargeable lithium-ion battery,Its standard charge takes 4 hours, the longest charge time is less than or equal to 8 hours.The average charge every three days
QUIET: No loud clicking even in the library or open office!
Offer One year warranty

reviews.title: Good for little kids
reviews.text:
This was for my 5 year old for distance learning.
Panda design is good and eye pleaser
Ergonomics.. this is easy to use but you will need to stretch wrists every hour or so.
Haven't used it for gaming but easy to use.
Connects with wire to computer so battery life is as long as your laptop/desktop is on

reviews.title: Perfect fit
reviews.text: Perfect for my hand it’s made of a nice smooth rubber like material

reviews.title: So cute
reviews.text: I love it! 🐼❤
